decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id (project_34th-street-transitway-concept) is the closest registry match — the registry card already lists source 20100615_34th_transitway_cac_mtg_summary and alias project_34th-street-transitway-20100615-cac. The observation describes the same 34th Street Transitway concept CAC meeting #1 (June 15, 2010). Per identity rules, when the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is 'new'.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 34th Street Transitway - Eric Beaton, Project Manager of the Transitway at DOT, and Ted Orosz, the director of Long-Range Bus Planning for NYCT gave a PowerPoint presentation on the 34th Street Transitway.
